calendar.matters:
MOTION Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-13-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Petitioner and moving party Michelle McGill (no phone number ) appeared on her own behalf. Stephen B. McDonagh, Esq., 415-753-2959, appeared on behalf of respondent and opposing party Beverly Menicucci.

After argument the court adopted its tentative ruling with modification: Petitioner to confirm Granted. Request for interest is denied. Costs are awarded. The order was signed in open court. (JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
